jd_text: Role : Lead Data Merchandizer Contract Duration : 6 months Location : Onsite in Dubai , UAE The Lead Data Merchandizer will own and drive end-to-end data quality, cleansing, validation, and migration readiness for enterprise transformation initiatives across platforms such as PIM, RLM, ERP, and Merchandising systems. Key Responsibilities • Own data cleansing and validation strategy across assigned domains • Define and enforce data quality rules and standards • Lead identification and resolution of data gaps and inconsistencies • Manage data load cycles (sandbox, UAT, production) • Coordinate with business SMEs and functional consultants • Maintain data quality dashboards, issue logs, and documentation Required Skills & Experience • Retail domain experience – Mandatory • 8–10 years of data management or migration experience • Advanced Excel and working SQL knowledge • Experience with PIM / Merchandising / ERP systems • Strong stakeholder management skills Deliverables • Clean and validated datasets • Data quality dashboards and issue logs • Migration-ready files with business sign-off
